content:
Hyper-realistic digital illustration of {argument name="scene" default="the historic Shanghai Bund waterfront looking across the Huangpu River to the futuristic Lujiazui district"}, presented as a single continuous composition showcasing the cycle of seasons. The scene flows seamlessly from left to right in a natural progression: Winter, Spring, Summer, and Autumn. 

The left side features cold snowy winter elements, gradually thawing into the fresh green buds and blooms of spring, then morphing into the lush vibrant vegetation and bright sunlight of summer, and finally transitioning into the golden, orange, and red hues of autumn on the far right. 

There are no visible dividing lines between seasons; the weather, lighting, and vegetation blend smoothly to create a unified and harmonious panorama. Rich in detail, symbolic of the passage of time, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, highly detailed textures. --ar 4:3
title: Four Seasons Continuity Panorama
description: A complex prompt for creating a seamless transition through all four seasons in a single panoramic digital illustration, demonstrated with the Shanghai Bund waterfront.

content: A futuristic {argument name="scene" default="cyberpunk outdoor music market"} scene, massive towering wall of industrial speakers and electronic panels forming a colossal sound system, {argument name="lighting" default="glowing orange"} subwoofers, complex grids of LED controls and wires, giant digital screen displaying a neon cityscape, a {argument name="subject" default="young person"} seen from behind wearing headphones and a hoodie with a crossbody bag, holding a tablet device, crowd of people walking through a gritty market with tents and stalls, overcast sky, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, wide-angle perspective, dystopian atmosphere, high contrast, photorealistic, 8k, sharp focus, depth of field
title: Futuristic Cyberpunk Music Market
description: A highly detailed prompt for generating a dystopian cyberpunk scene featuring a massive sound system and a crowded neon market.

content: A cinematic Renaissance art studio interior lit by soft warm window light, showing an elderly Leonardo da Vinci-like painter in left profile, seated at an easel and painting the Mona Lisa from a live model. The painter has long gray hair, a full gray beard, and wears a dark period cap and heavy dark robe. In the center foreground stands a large canvas on a wooden easel displaying the Mona Lisa composition, while on the right a live female sitter poses in the same iconic posture with folded hands, wearing a dark Renaissance dress and veil-like drapery. The mood is intimate, quiet, and painterly, with rich brown and amber tones, dramatic chiaroscuro, aged plaster walls, a leaded-glass window on the left, and a wooden table in the back holding brushes and studies. Include 2 portrait sketches pinned or propped in the background behind the model. In the lower right foreground, show a cluttered painter’s worktable with 1 paint palette, multiple small paint dabs, several brushes in a cup, and a few shallow bowls. Compose the scene as a realistic historical photograph of the moment the masterpiece is being created, medium-wide shot, slightly over-the-shoulder from behind the artist, extremely detailed textures, old master atmosphere, soft focus falloff, no modern objects.
title: Leonardo Painting the Mona Lisa
description: This prompt generates a cinematic historical scene of Leonardo da Vinci painting the Mona Lisa from a live model, ideal for dramatic fine-art and Renaissance-themed visuals.

content: A cinematic dark fantasy photograph of a weathered marble-like woman seen from behind in a ruined garden at sunset, framed from mid-back upward. Her face is turned partly over her shoulder but remains mostly hidden in shadow. She has an antique Greco-Roman appearance with pale stone-textured skin, hair pinned into a loose classical updo, and a draped one-shoulder gown in aged ivory fabric that looks cracked, dusty, and partially fused to her body like an eroded sculpture. Across her exposed back and arm are delicate botanical tattoo-like markings and a faded blue floral mosaic embedded into the shoulder blade area. The atmosphere is moody, haunting, and elegant. Place 2 tall stone columns in deep shadow on the left background, dense dark trees and foliage on both sides, and clusters of small pale flowers in the lower garden. Use a glowing amber-orange sunset sky behind her as a strong backlight, with soft rim light on her shoulders and hair, very deep shadows in the foreground, shallow depth of field, rich contrast, muted earth tones, and ultra-detailed textures of cracked plaster, aged fabric, and stone. Fine-art editorial photography, hyperreal, mysterious, melancholic, 85mm lens look.
title: Haunting Statue Woman at Sunset
description: This prompt generates a moody fine-art cinematic portrait of a stone-like classical woman in a ruined garden, ideal for dark fantasy editorial or atmospheric concept imagery.

content: A dramatic ultra-realistic motorsport action photograph of a modern Formula 1 race car in {argument name="team livery" default="dark navy with red and yellow accents"} charging through heavy rain on a soaked circuit, shot from a very low trackside angle near the front-left corner of the car. The car dominates the foreground, with slick aerodynamic bodywork, exposed wet tires throwing up massive sprays of water, glowing red reflections on the wet asphalt, and sharp sponsor-style markings across the nose, front wing, sidepod, and rear wing. Capture the sensation of high speed with subtle motion blur in the background and water streaks, while keeping the car body mostly crisp and detailed. The scene takes place in a packed stadium-like racetrack with 1 main grandstand full of blurred spectators along the left side, 2 bright red illuminated signage boards in the distance, 1 safety fence running parallel to the track, and 1 reflective rain-soaked racing surface stretching toward the camera. Overhead, dense storm clouds fill the sky, creating a moody cinematic atmosphere with cold blue-gray tones contrasted by the car’s vivid warm colors. Emphasize dramatic spray, reflections, realism, tension, and the feeling of a championship race in brutal weather, as if captured on a professional sports telephoto-lens camera with shallow depth of field, high contrast, and editorial motorsport photography styling.
title: Rain-Soaked Formula Race Car Action
description: This prompt generates a cinematic, ultra-realistic Formula 1-style racing photo in heavy rain, ideal for sports posters, editorial visuals, and dramatic motorsport content.

content: Ultra-realistic interior photograph of a {argument name="aircraft model" default="Boeing 747"} cockpit viewed from slightly behind and between the two pilot seats, centered and perfectly symmetrical, showing the full main instrument panel, center pedestal, dual control yokes, and the overhead switch panel across the top edge of the frame. The cockpit is unoccupied, with 2 pilot seats visible in the foreground, each with light gray or off-white sheepskin seat covers, and 2 control yokes each holding a dark rectangular checklist or electronic note board clipped to the center. The main panel is densely packed with authentic-looking avionics, analog dials, autopilot controls, radio panels, and 6 illuminated display screens total: 2 large central navigation displays, 2 smaller blue-toned flight displays near the left and right sides, and 2 green text/data screens on the lower center pedestal. Include 4 throttle levers in the center, plus additional flap and systems levers, rotary knobs, guarded switches, and weathered brown-gray metal surfaces typical of a widebody airliner cockpit. The overhead panel should be crowded with rows of switches, toggles, and indicator lights, partially shadowed but sharply detailed. Through the front cockpit windows, show an airport gate scene in soft focus with pale concrete tarmac, painted ground markings, and a passenger jet bridge connected or positioned near the aircraft. Lighting is natural daylight from outside, subdued inside the cockpit, with realistic shadows, mild reflections on glass screens, and documentary-style photographic color grading. Emphasize extreme detail, realism, authentic aviation engineering complexity, and a near indistinguishable-from-real photo quality. Shot with a full-frame camera, eye-level perspective, wide lens around 24–28mm, deep focus across the instrument panel, high dynamic range, no people, no dramatic stylization, no illustration look.
title: Photorealistic Boeing 747 Cockpit
description: This prompt generates a highly realistic front-on airliner cockpit interior image suitable for aviation visualization, simulation art, or editorial-style aircraft imagery.

content:
# Art that reveals a character's face from a chaotic collection of notes and symbols

---

## Style
- Mass of handwritten notes, formulas, symbols, and random lines in black ink on white paper.
- Scribbled chaos scattered across the paper.
- Sporadic emphasis using {argument name="accent color" default="red ink"} (lines, fills, marker-like blobs).
- Texture of analog notebook doodles.

---

## Composition
- Random notes and symbols cover the entire area.
- The density of black ink lines and characters concentrates on the position of the "character's face."
- As a result, the silhouette and expression of the given character's face faintly emerge from the chaos.
- The face is not realistic but formed by a collection of chaotic fragments.

---

## Color Palette
- Mainly monochrome (black and white).
- {argument name="accent color" default="red ink"} placed sporadically as an accent.
- Low saturation, emphasizing the feel of analog paper and ink.

---

## Expressive Elements
- Mixed strings of semi-readable Japanese, English, and numbers.
- Mathematical symbols, arrows, dots, slashes, crosses, and ink drips.
- The outlines of the face, eyes, and hair emerge from the "negative space" and "shading" of the symbol placement.

---

## Prohibitions
- Direct, realistic portraits.
- Digitally processed, orderly geometric patterns.
- Colorful or oversaturated expressions.
- Logos, watermarks, or artificial CG aesthetics.

---

## Definition of Done (DoD)
- The whole piece works as a "chaotic collection of notes and symbols."
- The provided character's face naturally emerges from the density and arrangement of chaos.
- Colors are monochrome + {argument name="accent color" default="red accent"} only.
- Maintains the hand-drawn texture of paper and ink.
title: Abstract Chaos Character Art
description: A highly detailed structured prompt that transforms a character image into abstract art composed of notes and symbols.

content: A highly detailed, cinematic, surreal illustration of an astronaut in a white spacesuit kneeling to carefully prune a {argument name="plant type" default="bonsai tree"}. The astronaut is situated on a floating fragment of a {argument name="architecture style" default="ruined classical marble temple"} overgrown with ivy and moss, featuring ornate gold trim, classical columns, and a stone statue of a woman. The platform is suspended in zero gravity in outer space. Floating debris, including rocks, chunks of marble, and loose leaves, drift weightlessly around the scene. In the background, a {argument name="background planet" default="large reddish-orange planet"} dominates the starry cosmos. The lighting is dramatic and realistic, highlighting the contrast between the ancient ruins, delicate nature, and the futuristic astronaut.
title: Astronaut Tending Bonsai in Space Ruins
description: Generates a surreal sci-fi scene of an astronaut interacting with nature on a floating architectural ruin in space.

content: An aerial drone shot of an expansive, perfectly flat, {argument name="terrain color" default="vibrant green"} grassy plain stretching endlessly to a distant horizon. In the lower foreground, exactly two {argument name="animal" default="fluffy white sheep"} are standing and grazing. Bright, clear daylight casts sharp, dark shadows from the animals towards the left. Above the horizon is a {argument name="sky condition" default="clear, pale blue sky with a few faint, wispy clouds"}. The composition emphasizes the vast emptiness and scale of the landscape compared to the small animals.
title: Aerial View of Vast Grassy Plain with Two Sheep
description: Generates an aerial landscape photograph of a vast, flat grassy field with two small animals, emphasizing scale and minimalism.

content: A {argument name="art style" default="traditional Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print"} landscape featuring an {argument name="main character" default="anthropomorphic glass of beer with a frothy head, a happy smiling face, stick-like yellow arms and legs, and traditional sandals"} walking on a dirt path. The character holds a blue round fan displaying the kanji "{argument name="fan text" default="涼"}". The background includes a large pine tree and a wooden bridge on the right with 3 small figures crossing, plus 3 more figures walking on the path. To the left, tall reeds border a river leading to a distant {argument name="background mountain" default="snow-capped Mount Fuji"} under a gradient sky. A traditional text cartouche in the top left reads "{argument name="top left text" default="東海道 五十三次之内 由井"}" next to red artist seals, with a matching cartouche in the bottom left. The image has vintage, muted colors and authentic woodblock paper textures.
title: Ukiyo-e Mascot Landscape
description: Generates a traditional Japanese woodblock print featuring a customizable mascot character in a classic Mount Fuji landscape.

content: A cinematic, photorealistic wide-angle shot from inside a spacecraft looking out a circular window into the deep blackness of space. On the left side of the frame, a {argument name="celestial body left" default="massive, highly detailed crescent Moon"} dominates the view, showcasing intricate craters and rugged terrain illuminated by harsh sunlight. On the right side, a smaller {argument name="celestial body right" default="crescent Earth"} glows with blue oceans and white atmospheric clouds. In the immediate foreground on the far left, an {argument name="foreground element" default="astronaut's arm wearing a dark blue spacesuit"} is visible, featuring a prominent {argument name="patch logo" default="NASA"} patch on the shoulder. The astronaut is holding a digital tablet with a glowing blue, complex user interface. The edge of the spacecraft window frames the scene, with subtle lens flares and reflections on the glass adding to the immersive, sci-fi documentary aesthetic. High contrast, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution.
title: Cinematic Spacecraft View of Moon and Earth
description: Generates a photorealistic, cinematic view from inside a spacecraft window looking at celestial bodies, with an astronaut in the foreground.

content: An overhead anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Anna Yanami"} lying on her back on a {argument name="setting" default="classroom desk"}. She has messy {argument name="hair color" default="blue"} hair with an ahoge, and bright blue eyes. She is {argument name="expression" default="smiling happily with a slight blush"} and {argument name="pose" default="holding up both hands in peace signs"}. She wears a white short-sleeved school shirt decorated with four bows down the front in alternating colors of dark blue, light blue, and yellow, paired with a light blue pleated skirt featuring a white stripe near the hem. The scene is lit by warm afternoon sunlight casting distinct shadows across the desk and her body, with a wooden floor visible in the background.

The character has {argument name="character hair" default="long dark hair in a messy high ponytail"}, glowing red eyes, and wears tattered black traditional clothing while holding a {argument name="weapon" default="katana"} angled downwards. The scene includes 3 prominent tattered banners with Japanese kanji planted among shadowy debris. content: A highly detailed, intricate {argument name="art style" default="black and white line art illustration"} of an {argument name="subject" default="anime-style angel"}. She has long, flowing wavy hair adorned with a {argument name="headpiece" default="floral crown of roses and lilies"} and is looking directly at the viewer with large, expressive eyes. Her {argument name="pose" default="hands are clasped together in prayer"}. She has large, feathered angel wings extending from her back and wears an incredibly ornate dress completely covered in dense floral patterns, lace, and filigree, along with a detailed jeweled choker and dangling earrings. Behind her head is a radiant, glowing halo with straight, sunburst-like lines. The entire background is filled with symmetrical, baroque-style floral and vine filigree, creating a dense, tapestry-like frame. The style is strictly monochrome, resembling a highly complex ink drawing, engraving, or an intricate adult coloring book page, with meticulous linework.

content: A photorealistic, cinematic shot set in the {argument name="location" default="White House press briefing room"}. At the podium sits {argument name="seated character" default="Sam Altman"}, wearing a dark suit and blue tie, looking visibly uncomfortable and nervous, staring blankly ahead. Standing directly behind him is {argument name="standing character" default="Homelander from The Boys"}, wearing his signature blue superhero suit with red gloves and gold eagle shoulder pads. The standing character has one red-gloved hand resting heavily and intimidatingly on the seated character's shoulder, while using his other hand to drink from a {argument name="beverage" default="glass bottle of milk"} with a confident, slightly unhinged smirk. In the background, there is a US flag on the left and a blue oval White House seal on the wall behind them. The podium has a sign reading "THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON".
title: Intimidating Press Conference Meme
description: A photorealistic satirical image of a superhero intimidating a tech CEO at a White House press briefing.

content: Create an image consisting of {argument name="panel count" default="five"} sub-images, each with a different style: 1) An analogue clock showing {argument name="time" default="7:42"}. 2) A woman holding cards in her hands. 3) A glass of wine filled to the brim. 4) Real photography of a physical chessboard, fully visible, with all the pieces in their standard starting positions. 5) Two dice, with the numbers clearly visible.
title: Five-Panel Benchmarking Challenge
description: A complex multi-part prompt used to benchmark AI performance across five different styles and subjects, including clocks, humans, liquids, and games.
